title: 「The sooner..., the better」句型
titleEn: Using The sooner..., the better for earlier action

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: The sooner + subject + verb + other information, the better.

formulas.formula: The sooner + subject + verb + other information, the better.
The sooner + subject + verb + other information, the better + subject + verb.

example: The sooner you finish your homework, the better.

examples.en: The sooner you finish your homework, the better.
examples.highlight: The sooner you finish your homework, the better

examples.en: The sooner she sees a doctor, the better.
examples.highlight: The sooner she sees a doctor, the better

examples.en: The sooner you send the application, the better your chances of getting an interview will be.
examples.zh: 你愈早遞交申請，獲得面試的機會便愈大。
examples.highlight: The sooner you send the application, the better your chances of getting an interview will be

meaning.zh: 這個句型表示某件事愈早發生或完成愈好，或者愈早行動，結果便會愈理想。

rules.zh: 在這個句型中，sooner 通常解作「更早」，表示提早行動更加理想。
rules.en: In this structure, sooner means earlier and indicates that earlier action is preferable.
examples: The sooner you start, the better.

rules.zh: Sooner 已經是 soon 的比較級，前面不可再加 more。
rules.en: Do not use more sooner because sooner is already the comparative form of soon.
examples: The sooner we leave, the better.

rules.zh: 兩部分之間通常使用逗號。
rules.en: Use a comma between the two parts.
examples: The sooner you reply, the better.

rules.zh: 即使談及將來，第一部分通常使用現在簡單式，而不是 will。
rules.en: For many future situations, use the present simple in the first part rather than will.
examples: The sooner you start, the better it will be.

rules.zh: 當上文已清楚說明行動時，可以省略主語和動詞，直接說 The sooner, the better。
rules.en: The sooner, the better can stand alone when the action is already understood.

rules.zh: The sooner..., the better 表示愈早愈好；as soon as 表示一……就……，主要說明時間次序。
rules.en: The sooner..., the better means earlier is preferable; as soon as means immediately when and describes time sequence.
examples: The sooner you call her, the better.
Call me as soon as you arrive.

rules.zh: Should 後面使用動詞原形。
rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after should.
examples: When should we submit the report?

benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚告訴別人提早行動更加理想，適合提出建議或提醒。
benefits.en: This structure clearly tells someone that taking action earlier is preferable.

benefits.zh: 第一部分說明事情有多早發生，第二部分說明提早行動帶來的好處或結果。
benefits.en: The first part describes how early something happens, while the second explains the benefit or result.

benefits.zh: 不需要很長解釋，也可以用一句直接句子表達相同意思。
benefits.en: Instead of giving a long explanation, you can express the same message in one direct sentence.

benefits.zh: 當行動已經清楚時，The sooner, the better 是自然、簡潔而有力的口語回應。
benefits.en: When the action is already understood, The sooner, the better provides a natural and efficient reply.

benefits.zh: 它能表達迫切性，但聽起來較像建議而不是強硬命令。
benefits.en: The structure can show urgency while still sounding like advice rather than an order.

benefits.zh: 記住框架後，可以代入不同人物、行動和結果，方便組織口語和寫作。
benefits.en: Once you remember the frame, you can insert different people, actions and results into it.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence or dialogue using The sooner..., the better.
You may use the full pattern or the short pattern when appropriate.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 The sooner..., the better 改寫以下句子或對話。
你可以按題意使用完整句式或簡短句式。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It is best to finish your homework as early as possible.
questions.promptZh: 最好盡早完成你的家課。
questions.answer: The sooner you finish your homework, the better.
questions.answerZh: 你愈早完成家課愈好。
questions.highlight: The sooner you finish your homework, the better.

questions.prompt: For Mia, going to bed earlier would be better.
questions.promptZh: 對米婭來說，早一點上床睡覺會更好。
questions.answer: For Mia, the sooner she goes to bed, the better.
questions.answerZh: 對米婭來說，她愈早上床睡覺愈好。
questions.highlight: For Mia, the sooner she goes to bed, the better.

questions.highlight: The sooner we leave home, the better.

questions.promptZh: 為了長遠發展，政府應該盡早處理房屋短缺問題。
questions.answer: For long-term progress, the sooner the government addresses the housing shortage, the better.

questions.answer: The sooner the software company releases a security update, the better protected users will be.

questions.promptZh: A：「我們應該甚麼時候遞交報告？」）（B：「我們應該盡早遞交。」
questions.answer: The sooner, the better.

questions.answer: The sooner, the better.

questions.highlight: We need to tell the staff about the change; the sooner, the better.

questions.prompt: If the city restores clean water earlier, the public will be better protected.
questions.promptZh: 如果城市早點恢復潔淨食水供應，公眾便會得到更好的保護。
questions.answer: The sooner the city restores clean water, the better protected the public will be.
questions.answerZh: 城市愈早恢復潔淨食水供應，公眾便會得到愈好的保護。
questions.highlight: The sooner the city restores clean water, the better protected the public will be.
